info.title: NMF Code generator
info.description: This package contains the code generator of the .NET Modelling Framework (NMF) packaged as a .NET Core Tool.

options.name: --language
options.description:
(Default: CS) The language in which the code
should be generated

options.name: --folder
options.description:
Determines whether the code for classes should be
separated to multiple files

options.name: --parallel
options.description:
If specified, runs the code generator in parallel
mode (in incubation)

options.name: --force
options.description:
If specified, the code is generated regardless of
existing code

options.name: --model-uri
options.description:
If specified, overrides the uri of the base
package.

options.name: --primitive-types
options.description:
If set, Ecore Data types are transformed to
primitive types

options.name: --output
options.description: Required. The output file/folder in which the code

options.name: --metamodel
options.description:
Specify this argument if you want to serialize the
NMeta metamodel possibly generated from Ecore

options.name: --save-nmeta
options.description:
If set, Ecore2Code will save any metamodel
consumed in a different format that NMeta as an
NMeta file in the same directory.

options.name: --resolve
options.description:
A list of namespace remappings with optional code
base namespace override in the syntax
URI@baseNamespace=file, multiple entries separated
by ';'

options.name: --type-mapping
options.description:
A list of type mappings in the syntax <Ecore
Instance Class>=<.NET class>, multiple entries
separated by ';'

options.name: --input-only
options.description: If set, generate code for input files only

options.name: --no-events
options.description:
If set, no dedicated events are generated for
properties. This has the same effect as no-changed
and no-changing together

options.name: --no-changed
options.description: If set, no Changed events are generated for events

options.name: --no-changing
options.description: If set, no Changed events are generated for events

options.name: --collectionsAreElements
options.description: If set, collections are all rendered as elements
